c.d: Availability of the app on multiple operating systems and devices (e.g., iOS, Android, Windows, Mac, Web).
Ability to organize notes using tags, folders, sections, or notebooks to retrieve notes efficiently.
Capability to share notes with others and collaborate in real-time or asynchronously.
Support for handwriting input, handwriting recognition, and stylus integration.
Ability to access and edit notes without an internet connection.
Support for embedding images, sketches, diagrams, and other media within notes.
Availability of version history to recover previous note versions and automatic backups.
Cost structure whether free, freemium, or paid with subscription or one-time fees.
